mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_category(name, description, parent_id, sort_order) VALUES(#{name}, #{description}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE material_category SET is_deleted=1 WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM material_category WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=0
SELECT * FROM material_category WHERE is_deleted=0 ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT * FROM material_category WHERE parent_id=#{parentId} AND is_deleted=0 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM material_category WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND is_deleted=0
